options.name: -allow_weak_connect
options.description: Decreate specified pillar number to avoid drc

options.name: -max_extension_distance
options.description: Specify the max distance that target PG pin can extend to target layer

options.name: -pins
options.description: Specify the cell pins to be connected

options.name: -pins_group_distance
options.description: Specify the side_to_side distance of pins to be treated as a group during connecting target PG pins

options.name: -respect_routes
options.description: Specifies whether to honor pre-existing routes check during stripe generation

options.name: -share_resource
options.description: New added PG connect to the existing PG at middle layer

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
